arts.ttl: Real Madrid icon makes firm ‘crisis’ point amid form issues
arts.sum: A former Real Madrid star has dismissed talk of a crisis at the club this season. Los Blancos have been far from their ruthless best so far in 2024/25 with injuries playing a key role in their inconsistency. However, ahead of the penultimate round of La Liga games in 2024, Carlo Ancelotti’s defending Spanish and […] The post Real Madrid icon makes firm ‘crisis’ point amid form issues appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid want Arsenal target to UNLOCK Mbappe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have joined the race to sign Inter Milan forward Marcus Thuram, according to sensational reports in Spain. Arsenal and Manchester United have both been linked with the 27-year-old for the past few months, while Barcelona, Real Madrid and Liverpool are also interested in signing him next year, according to Spanish outlet Fichajes .

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid ready to lock horns over signing of Benfica youngster
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two biggest clubs are both expressing a keen interest in the signing of Benfica talent Álvaro Carreras. That’s according to A Bola, who have on Friday provided an…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid include players with long-term injuries in Intercontinental Cup squad list
arts.sum: As far as Real Madrid are concerned, if the team manages to clinch the Intercontinental Cup in Qatar next week, every member of the first team squad will receive a winners' medal - even those ones who won’t be physically taking part in the tournament. For their part in helping the team get to this stage (by winning last season’s Champions League), players who are currently out recovering from long-term injuries have been officially registered for the tournament - even though they have no chance of playing.
